data.title: Lucid CEO Throws Cold Water On Tesla's Robotaxi Vision, Says Self-Driving Cars Won't Happen 'Till The 2030s'
data.description: Lucid CEO Peter Rawlinson may have added to his rivalry against Tesla with comments against the growth of autonomous vehicles.

data.title: Donald Trump Victory Could Propel Bitcoin To $92,000, Predicts Bitwise's Head Of Strategy
data.description: Jeff Park, Head of Alpha Strategies at Bitwise, has projected that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could skyrocket to $92,000 in the event of a Donald Trump election victory.

data.title: Gov. Newsom's Cannabis Task Force Seized $191M So Far In 2024 As California Tightens Regulations
data.description: California's UCETF seizes $191M in illegal cannabis. Gov. Newsom strengthens cannabis enforcement and implements hemp regulations.

data.title: Palantir Stock Moves Higher On L3Harris Partnership: What You Need To Know
data.description: Palantir Technologies shares are moving higher in Wednesday's after-hours session after the company and L3Harris Technologies announce a partnership to accelerate advanced technology development.
